recommendations.title: Pauline at the Beach
recommendations.overview: Marion is about to divorce from her husband and takes her 15-year-old niece, Pauline, on a vacation to Granville. There, she meets an old love...

recommendations.title: The Green Ray
recommendations.overview: A lonely Parisian woman comes to terms with her isolation and anxieties during a long summer vacation.

recommendations.title: Full Moon in Paris
recommendations.overview: Feeling suffocated by a possessive boyfriend, work and suburban life, a young woman starts spending the weekends in her Paris apartment in order to reclaim some of her lost freedom.

recommendations.title: Suzanne’s Career
recommendations.overview: In the second of Rohmer's moral tales, he examines the relationship between two friends and a girl who at first appears easily exploited. It is a complex tale of feelings and misconceptions, acted out within the head of the main character, as part of

recommendations.title: A Tale of Autumn
recommendations.overview: Magali, forty-something, is a winemaker and a widow: she loves her work but feels lonely. Her friends Rosine  and Isabelle both want secretly to find a husband for Magali.

recommendations.title: A Tale of Springtime
recommendations.overview: The story of an introverted young girl  just reaching adulthood who takes a liking to an older woman she meets at a party and determines to match her off with her father, despite the latter's already having a lover of his own.

recommendations.title: A Tale of Winter
recommendations.overview: Felicie and Charles have a whirlwind holiday romance. Due to a mix-up on addresses they lose contact, and five years later at Christmas-time Felicie is living with her mother in a cold Paris with a daughter as a reminder of that long-ago summer. For

recommendations.title: The Aviator's Wife
recommendations.overview: A student is devastated when he finds that his girlfriend is cheating on him. In order to find out why she did it, he decides to spy on her and her airline pilot lover. Then he sees the pilot with a blonde woman and he begins to follow them…

recommendations.title: The Grand Highway
recommendations.overview: Louis, a nine-year-old boy from Paris, spends his summer vacation in a small town in Brittany. His mother Claire has lodged him with her girlfriend Marcelle and her husband Pelo while she's having her second baby. There Louis makes friends with Marti

recommendations.title: Love in the Afternoon
